evidence_summary: Establish the supernatural threat of the cave through auditory and psychological terror, forcing a chaotic retreat of the apache_warriors.

A group of Apache warriors approaches the cave entrance. They find the protagonist but are interrupted by a terrifying, low moaning sound emanating from the depths. The warriors flee in panic; one warrior falls to his death during the retreat.
From curiosity/investigation to primal terror and chaos.
apache_warriors moving cautiously toward the cave entrance in moonlight.
Chaos and panic as warriors flee, resulting in one death from a fall.
Investigation leads to auditory terror, triggering a panicked retreat and accidental death.
